title: inbox.confirm
description: Confirm the next action for a classified Inbox item. For single_type items, action must be 'confirm' (direct Inventory promotion). For mixed items, action must be 'split' (generate a reviewable plan). Always creates or references a Plan in state ready_for_review.

action.description: 'split' for mixed Inbox items; 'confirm' for single_type Inbox items.

plan_state.description: Plans created by this operation always land in ready_for_review.

items_total.description: Number of plan items created. Equals the number of scanned files in the Inbox item.

errors.description: No InboxItem exists for the provided inbox_item_id.
The Inbox item already has a Plan in an open state (draft, ready_for_review, approved, or applying). The caller should route to the existing plan.
Action does not match the current classification. For example: action='confirm' on a mixed item, or action='split' on a single_type item, or any action on an unclassified item.
The active Naming & Structure pattern (spec 015) is unset, invalid, or fails to resolve required tokens for one or more files. No plan was created.
